name: Single A100 QAT Performance Fix
blurb: Enabled QAT directly within CastedLinear using straight-through estimators. Crucially refactored torch.quantile to .amax(dim=1) to alleviate a 30x compiler performance penalty that was blocking completions. Run fits perfectly in a Single A100 constraint for 10 minutes runtime natively using 2600 steps.
author: Shuvam Banerji Seal
